creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-12-14 20:13:34 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-RTx-Shredder  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  RTx::Shredder is extention to RT API which allow you to delete data
  from RT database. Now Shredder support wipe out of almost all RT
  objects (Tickets, Transactions, Attachments, Users...)
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/perldoc?RTx::Shredder
  
  PR:             ports/126783
  Submitted by:   Matthew Seaman <m.seaman at infracaninophile.co.uk>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2204    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +46 -0     ports/www/p5-RTx-Shredder/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-RTx-Shredder/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/p5-RTx-Shredder/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +70 -0     ports/www/p5-RTx-Shredder/pkg-plist (new)
